data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"170b-2ac9","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"Commit-level source attribution via git-native trailers","doneDefinitions":["When attribution is enabled, commits made via /dso:commit contain DSO-Skill, DSO-Agent, DSO-Task, DSO-Story, DSO-Epic, DSO-Model, and DSO-Review-Score trailers (each present only when its source value is non-empty)","The attribution.enabled config key in dso-config.conf controls whether trailers are appended (default: false)","Standard git trailer queries return the correct skill name for attributed commits","Commits without resolvable context omit all DSO trailers and /dso:commit completes successfully","Trailers conform to git trailer block convention (blank line separator, no pollution of subject or body)","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] git interpret-trailers version compatibility \u2014 graceful degradation when git <2.6","[Reliability] Stale active-skill-context \u2014 validate session currency before reading","[Reliability] Trailer value sanitization \u2014 colons/newlines in ticket titles","[Testing] CI parser interaction \u2014 commit-lint/release-please compatibility","[Testing] Portability lint interaction \u2014 use short names not absolute paths","[Maintainability] active-agent-context is new \u2014 needs format documentation"]},"stories":[]}
